generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor–current sensor (I_M) measuring the armature current of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor on axis #1."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataStream
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring the output angle of the motor shaft on axis #1."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataStream
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearbox encoder measuring the output angle after the gearwheel on axis #1."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataStream
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual data transmission via MQTT
instance SensorDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]

instance SimulatedDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkMotorModel, SimulinkGearboxModel, SimulinkFullSystemModel
]

// C10: Data entities derived from sensor streams and simulation
instance CurrentMeasurementData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time current measurement of the motor taken from the I_M sensor, transmitted via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance OutputAngleMeasurementData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time output angle measurement of the motor and gearbox axes, derived from encoder sensors."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance TorqueDerivedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Computed joint torque derived from motor current and position measurements."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityDerivedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Computed angular velocity of the joint obtained from angle measurements."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance AccelerationDerivedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Computed angular acceleration of the joint derived from velocity measurements."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorTraceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured trace of the motor rotation (r_M) recorded from sensor streams."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance MeasuredGearboxTraceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured trace of the gearbox rotation (r_G) recorded from sensor streams."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance MeasuredOutputTraceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured trace of the overall joint output (r_out) recorded from sensor streams."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance SimulatedMotorTraceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated trace of the motor rotation (α_r_M) generated by the Simulink motor model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance SimulatedGearboxTraceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated trace of the gearbox rotation (α_r_G) generated by the Simulink gearbox model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputTraceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated trace of the joint output (α_r_out) generated by the full system Simulink model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

// C10: Models
instance SysMLConnectorDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML component‑connector diagram of the permanent‑magnet motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink model of the gearwheel and cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance SimulinkFullSystemModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink model of the first axis including motor, gearbox and joint, with friction variants."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance FrictionModelCoulombViscous : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Friction model implementing combined Coulomb and viscous effects."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance FrictionModelStribeck : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Friction model implementing Stribeck behavior for static‑kinetic transition."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance FrictionModelDahl : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Friction model implementing Dahl’s hysteresis behavior."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance FrictionModelLuGre : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Friction model implementing the LuGre dynamic friction model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance DataCalcTorqueModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data‑calculation model computing torque from current and position signals."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance DataCalcAngularVelocityModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data‑calculation model computing angular velocity from output angle signals."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance DataCalcAccelerationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data‑calculation model computing angular acceleration from velocity signals."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

// C11: Enabler that links data and models to services
instance DataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Core processing enabler linking all sensor data, simulation and data‑calculation models to the analysis services."
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringDashboardService, FrictionIdentificationService
]

// C6: Services
instance MonitoringDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring and visualization via a dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:provides CurrentStateInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous, multi‑physics‑aware identification of joint friction (static, kinetic, viscous) by comparing simulated and measured traces."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterEstimationInsight, LossContributionInsight, FrictionTrendInsight, RecommendControllerTuningAction, ScheduleMaintenanceAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance CurrentStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time representation of the joint current, velocity, and acceleration."
]

instance FrictionParameterEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated friction parameters (Coulomb, viscous, Stribeck, etc.) derived from trace comparison."
]

instance LossContributionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated loss contributions from friction, gear, and motor dynamics."
]

instance FrictionTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Trend analysis of friction parameters over time to forecast maintenance needs."
]

// C17: Actions
instance RecommendControllerTuningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic recommendation to adjust controller gains based on updated friction estimates."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ScheduleMaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Recommendation to schedule maintenance based on friction trend and loss analysis."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C17: Environment and Components
instance MotorComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent‑magnet synchronous motor of the first robot axis."
]

instance GearwheelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel providing mechanical amplification on the first axis."
]

instance CycloidalGearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox providing high‑torque conversion on the first axis."
]

instance MabiMax100RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorComponent, GearwheelComponent, CycloidalGearboxComponent
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time operation; sensor data and simulation outputs are updated synchronously with the physical system; identical timing of data streams and processing, but explicit sampling interval not provided."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of asset, purpose, sources, models, processing, and data traces according to the Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM); the first axis is linked via an AAS; purpose is FrictionDerivation; sources (measured I_M, output angle) feed the processing component that runs Simulink models to produce simulated traces; all components interconnected in a local server environment."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design (ideal frictionless baseline model), Manufacture (actual robot built), Operation (real‑time digital shadow with live data), and Continuous evolution via model adaptation during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Physical sensor accuracy and traceability, model verification by comparing simulated and measured torque/velocity; uncertainties due to load, temperature, wear mitigated by continuous identification; model validity assessed by residual analysis and parameter adaptation; no explicit V&V framework specified."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data transmitted over MQTT to the digital shadow; the shadow consumes data via MQTT topics; AAS likely communicates over HTTP/REST or OPC UA (not specified), but MQTT is the primary network protocol."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adoption of standard modeling languages – SysML for engineering models, Simulink for simulation; Asset Administration Shell follows the Industrie 4.0 standard defined by the Industrie 4.0 Forum; reference models (DSRM) and standard modeling conventions are employed."
]
